swahili.space_explorer_mission_select: Uteuzi wa misheni ya Space Explorer
swahili.how_space_explorer_works_click_to_togg: 📜 Jinsi Space Explorer inavyofanya kazi (bofya kubadili)
swahili.pick_a_destination_get_8_17_turns_to_s: Chagua marudio. Unapata zamu 8-17 kuokoka hatari zake huku ukikusanya sayansi. Kila zamu unaweka mgawanyo wa nguvu, unazindua, tukio lililotengenezwa na AI linaanzishwa, na unachagua jinsi wahudumu wako watakavyojibu. Ushindi = kuokoka zamu zote. Kushindwa = O₂ au ganda kufikia sifuri.
swahili.engineer_medic_scientist_etc_unlock_a_: (mhandisi, mhudumu wa afya, mwanasayansi, n.k.) hufungua chaguo la 4 lililofichwa wakati tukio linapolingana na ujuzi wao. Gusa mhudumu wakati wa tukio ili kushauriana.
swahili.opens_once_you_have_50_science_permane: hufunguka mara unapokuwa na sayansi 50+. Maboresho ya kudumu ambayo hupunguza matumizi ya rasilimali au hufungua chaguo mpya.
swahili.life_science_shields_comms_lets_you_bi: (Maisha / Sayansi / Ngao / Mawasiliano) hukuruhusu kuelekeza matumizi ya rasilimali kila zamu. Uamuzi kabla ya kuzindua.
swahili.tip_harder_destinations_give_more_scie: Kidokezo: marudio magumu zaidi hutoa sayansi zaidi. Mihiri na Mwezi ni vituo salama zaidi vya kuanzia. Ushindi, % bora na sayansi jumla hufuatiliwa kwa marudio chini ya kila kigae.
swahili.roguelike_missions_across_the_solar_sy: Misheni za roguelike katika mfumo wa jua. Kila mchezo hufundisha sayansi mpya.
swahili.each_pip_reduces_o_drain_by_1: Kila nukta hupunguza matumizi ya O₂ kwa 1.
swahili.each_pip_adds_1_science_at_event_resol: Kila nukta huongeza +1 sayansi wakati wa kutatua tukio.
swahili.each_pip_mitigates_1_point_of_hull_dam: Kila nukta hupunguza nukta 1 ya uharibifu wa ganda.
swahili.3_pips_waives_wrong_specialty_consult_: Nukta 3+ husamehe adhabu ya kushauriana utaalamu usio sahihi.
swahili.consult_a_specialist_about_this_event: Shauriana na mtaalamu kuhusu tukio hili
swahili.choose_your_response_press_1_2_or_3_to: Chagua jibu lako. Bonyeza 1, 2, au 3 kuchagua.
swahili.spacecraft_orbits_indefinitely_mission: Chombo cha angani kinazunguka bila kikomo. Misheni inawezekana.
swahili.atmospheric_drag_slowly_lowers_orbit: Buruta la angahewa hushusha mzunguko polepole.
swahili.adjust_sma_eccentricity_drag_widget_sh: Rekebisha SMA, eksentrisiti, buruta. Kijiwidget kinaonyesha matokeo 4 tofauti ya mzunguko. Hakuna alama, hakuna ufichuzi.
swahili.hypothesis_what_combination_produces_e: Dhana: ni mchanganyiko gani unaozalisha kutoroka?
swahili.find_two_stable_orbits_with_very_diffe: Pata mizunguko miwili thabiti yenye SMA tofauti sana.
swahili.why_does_increasing_eccentricity_at_hi: Kwa nini kuongeza eksentrisiti kwenye SMA ya juu husababisha kutoroka lakini si ajali?
swahili.explain_how_sma_eccentricity_and_drag_: Eleza jinsi SMA, eksentrisiti na buruta vinavyoamua pamoja hatima ya mzunguko.
swahili.design_note_discrete_4_state_orbital_m: Dokezo la muundo: alama tofauti ya mzunguko ya hali 4; hakuna alama ya ufanisi wa mafuta; hakuna ufichuzi — kwa makusudi.

hausa.how_space_explorer_works_click_to_togg: 📜 Yadda Space Explorer ke aiki (danna don sauyawa)
hausa.pick_a_destination_get_8_17_turns_to_s: Zaɓi makoma. Kana samun juyi 8-17 don tsira daga haɗarinta yayin tara kimiyya. Kowane juyi kana saita rabon wuta, kana harba, wani lamarin da AI ya ƙirƙira yana farawa, kuma kana zaɓar yadda ma'aikatanka za su mayar da martani. Nasara = tsira daga dukan juyi. Rashi = O₂ ko jirgi ya kai sifili.
hausa.engineer_medic_scientist_etc_unlock_a_: (injiniya, ma'aikacin lafiya, masanin kimiyya, da sauransu) suna buɗe zaɓi na 4 ɓoyayye lokacin da lamari ya dace da ƙwarewarsu. Taɓa memba na ma'aikata yayin lamari don tuntuɓa.
hausa.opens_once_you_have_50_science_permane: yana buɗewa idan kana da kimiyya 50+. Haɓakawa na dindindin waɗanda ke rage amfani da albarkatu ko buɗe sabbin zaɓuɓɓuka.
hausa.life_science_shields_comms_lets_you_bi: (Rai / Kimiyya / Garkuwoyi / Sadarwa) yana ba ka damar karkatar da amfani da albarkatu kowane juyi. Yanke shawara kafin harba.
hausa.tip_harder_destinations_give_more_scie: Shawara: makomai masu wuya suna ba da kimiyya mai yawa. Mars da Wata su ne wuraren farawa mafi aminci. Nasarori, mafi kyawun % da jimillar kimiyya ana bin su ta makoma ƙarƙashin kowace tayal.
hausa.roguelike_missions_across_the_solar_sy: Manufofin roguelike a faɗin tsarin rana. Kowane gudu yana koyar da sabuwar kimiyya.
hausa.available_mission_destinations: Makomomin manufa da ake da su
hausa.each_pip_reduces_o_drain_by_1: Kowane maki yana rage amfani da O₂ da 1.
hausa.each_pip_adds_1_science_at_event_resol: Kowane maki yana ƙara +1 kimiyya lokacin warware lamari.
hausa.each_pip_mitigates_1_point_of_hull_dam: Kowane maki yana rage maki 1 na lalacewar jirgi.
hausa.3_pips_waives_wrong_specialty_consult_: Maki 3+ suna kawar da hukuncin tuntuɓar ƙwarewar da ba daidai ba.
hausa.consult_a_specialist_about_this_event: Tuntuɓi gwani game da wannan lamari
hausa.choose_your_response_press_1_2_or_3_to: Zaɓi martaninka. Danna 1, 2, ko 3 don zaɓa.
hausa.mission_complete_preparing_debrief: 🎉 An kammala manufa! Ana shirya rahoto...
hausa.critical_failure_mission_ending: ⚠️ Gazawar mai tsanani! Manufa tana ƙarewa...
hausa.spacecraft_orbits_indefinitely_mission: Jirgin sama yana kewayawa har abada. Manufa mai yiwuwa.
hausa.atmospheric_drag_slowly_lowers_orbit: Jan iska yana saukar da kewayawa a hankali.
hausa.eccentricity_too_high_leaves_system: Eccentricity ya yi yawa — ya bar tsarin.
hausa.adjust_sma_eccentricity_drag_widget_sh: Daidaita SMA, eccentricity, jan iska. Widget yana nuna sakamako 4 daban-daban na kewayawa. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa.
hausa.hypothesis_what_combination_produces_e: Hasashe: wane haɗuwa ke samar da tserewa?
hausa.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ka makale — nuna tambayoyi a buɗe
hausa.find_two_stable_orbits_with_very_diffe: Nemo kewayoyi biyu masu kwanciyar hankali da SMA dabam-daban sosai.
hausa.why_does_increasing_eccentricity_at_hi: Me ya sa ƙara eccentricity a babban SMA ke haifar da tserewa amma ba faɗuwa ba?
hausa.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Na fahimta — yi bayani da kalmominka
hausa.explain_how_sma_eccentricity_and_drag_: Yi bayanin yadda SMA, eccentricity da jan iska ke tantance makomar kewayawa tare.
hausa.design_note_discrete_4_state_orbital_m: Bayanin ƙira: alamar kewayawa daban ta yanayi 4; babu makin ingancin man fetur; babu bayyanawa — da gangan.
